---
title: "Variable Window Size for Stepwise NOW"
---

```{r dacsetup, include=FALSE}
write.table(c("",
              "####################################",
              "####     Divide and Combine     ####",
              "####################################"),
            file=fn_log, quote=F, row.names=F, col.names=F, append=T)

outdir_division <- paste0(getwd(), "/division/")
outdir_combine <- paste0(getwd(), "/combine/")
lapply(list(outdir_division, outdir_combine), function(x) if(!dir.exists(x)) dir.create(x, recursive=T))

# output files
prefix_division_summary <- paste0(outdir_division, "summary_aic_iter")
fn_summary <- paste0(getwd(), "/summary.tsv")
fn_position_wsize <- paste0(getwd(), "/position_wsize.tiff")
fn_midpos_wsize <- paste0(getwd(), "/midpos_wsize.tiff")
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
options(scipen=999)

# extract list of windows
ls_windows <- list.dirs(params$outdir_stepwise_now_filtered, recursive=F, full.names=F)

# output file
df_current <- NULL
iterator <- 0
iterator_padded <- formatC(iterator, width=2, format="d", flag="0")

fn_df_current <- paste0(prefix_division_summary, iterator_padded, ".tsv")
if (file.exists(fn_df_current) && !params$redo) {
  df_current <- data.table::fread(fn_df_current)

} else {
  # create doSNOW cluster
  nwcl <- makeCluster(params$thread)
  doSNOW::registerDoSNOW(nwcl)

  # save the AIC per window
  df_current <- foreach (window = ls_windows, .combine='rbind') %dopar% {
    # input files
    fn_fasta <- paste0(params$outdir_stepwise_now_filtered, "/", window, "/", window, ".fa")
    fn_iqtree <- paste0(fn_fasta, ".iqtree")
    fn_treefile <- paste0(fn_fasta, ".treefile")

    # calculate AIC
    out <- f_window_tree_statistics(fn_iqtree, fn_treefile, NULL, NULL)
    aic <- (2 * out$freeparams) - (2 * out$logl)

    # read FASTA
    s <- seqinr::read.fasta(fn_fasta, whole.header = T)

    # update data.table
    return(data.table::data.table(iter=iterator_padded, window=window, length=length(s[[1]]), aic=aic, dir=fn_fasta, is_divided=TRUE))
  }

  stopCluster(nwcl)
  data.table::fwrite(as.data.frame(df_current), file=fn_df_current, row.names=F, col.names=T, quote=F, sep="\t")
}
```

```{r division}
is_repeat <- TRUE

# create doSNOW cluster
nwcl <- makeCluster(params$thread)
doSNOW::registerDoSNOW(nwcl)

# iterate over windows
while (is_repeat == TRUE) {
  # skip the iteration if all windows are not divisible
  if (all(df_current$is_divided == FALSE)) {
    is_repeat <- FALSE
    break
  }

  # update iterator
  iterator <- iterator + 1
  iterator_padded <- paste0("d",formatC(iterator, width=2, format="d", flag="0"))

  # output file
  fn_df_current <- paste0(prefix_division_summary, iterator_padded, ".tsv")
  if (file.exists(fn_df_current) && !params$redo) {
    df_current <- data.table::fread(fn_df_current)
    next
  }

  # iterate over windows
  df_output <- foreach (i = 1:nrow(df_current), .combine='rbind') %dopar% {
    require(dplyr)

    # skip the window if not divisible
    if (!df_current$is_divided[i]) {
      return(data.table::data.table(iter=df_current$iter[i], window=df_current$window[i], length=df_current$length[i], aic=df_current$aic[i], dir=df_current$dir[i], is_divided=FALSE))
    }

    # output directory
    dir_output <- paste0(outdir_division, "iter", iterator_padded, "/", df_current$window[i], "/")
    if (!dir.exists(dir_output)) {
      dir.create(dir_output, recursive=T)
    }

    # output file
    df_prop <- data.table::data.table(prop=character(), window_one=character(), window_two=character(),
                                                        length_one=numeric(), length_two=numeric(),
                                                        aic_one=numeric(), aic_two=numeric(),
                                                        dir_one=character(), dir_two=character())
    fn_output <- paste0(dir_output, "aic_table.tsv")

    if (file.exists(fn_output) && !params$redo) {
      df_prop <- data.table::fread(fn_output)

      if (nrow(df_prop) == 0) {
        return(data.table::data.table(iter=df_current$iter[i], window=df_current$window[i], length=df_current$length[i], aic=df_current$aic[i], dir=df_current$dir[i], is_divided=FALSE))
      }

    } else {
      # read FASTA
      seq <- seqinr::read.fasta(df_current$dir[i], whole.header = T)
      ln_seq <- length(seq[[1]])

      # extract AIC
      for (prop in params$division_prop) {
        window_one <- paste0(df_current$window[i], "_", gsub("\\.","",prop), "_1")
        window_two <- paste0(df_current$window[i], "_", gsub("\\.","",prop), "_2")

        # extract the alignment
        midpoint <- ceiling(prop*ln_seq)
        f_perwindow_run(dir_output, seq, window_one, 1, midpoint)
        f_perwindow_run(dir_output, seq, window_two, midpoint+1, ln_seq)

        # check -blmin
        seq_len_one <- length(1:midpoint)
        seq_len_two <- ln_seq - seq_len_one
        if (1/seq_len_one >= 0.1 || 1/seq_len_two >= 0.1) {
          next
        }

        # run IQ-TREE2
        fn_fasta_one <- paste0(dir_output, window_one, ".fa")
        fn_fasta_two <- paste0(dir_output, window_two, ".fa")
        f_iqtree2_single_keepident(fn_fasta_one, NULL, seq_len_one, params$set_blmin, params$set_model, params$dna_model, "", 0, params$iqtree2dir)
        f_iqtree2_single_keepident(fn_fasta_two, NULL, seq_len_two, params$set_blmin, params$set_model, params$dna_model, "", 0, params$iqtree2dir)

        # extract AIC
        fn_iqtree_one <- paste0(fn_fasta_one, ".iqtree")
        fn_treefile_one <- paste0(fn_fasta_one, ".treefile")
        if (!file.exists(fn_iqtree_one)) {
          next
        }

        out_one <- f_window_tree_statistics(fn_iqtree_one, fn_treefile_one, NULL, NULL)
        aic_one <- (2 * out_one$freeparams) - (2 * out_one$logl)

        fn_iqtree_two <- paste0(fn_fasta_two, ".iqtree")
        fn_treefile_two <- paste0(fn_fasta_two, ".treefile")
        if (!file.exists(fn_iqtree_two)) {
          next
        }

        out_two <- f_window_tree_statistics(fn_iqtree_two, fn_treefile_two, NULL, NULL)
        aic_two <- (2 * out_two$freeparams) - (2 * out_two$logl)

        # update data.frame
        df_prop <- rbind(df_prop, data.table::data.table(prop=prop, window_one=window_one, window_two=window_two,
                                                                    length_one=seq_len_one, length_two=seq_len_two,
                                                                    aic_one=aic_one, aic_two=aic_two,
                                                                    dir_one=fn_fasta_one, dir_two=fn_fasta_two))
      }

      # save data.frame
      data.table::fwrite(df_prop, file=fn_output, quote=F, row.names=F, col.names=T, sep="\t")
    }

    # extract the best AIC score
    if (nrow(df_prop) == 0) {
      return(data.table::data.table(iter=df_current$iter[i], window=df_current$window[i], length=df_current$length[i], aic=df_current$aic[i], dir=df_current$dir[i], is_divided=FALSE))
    }

    df_output_min_aic <- df_prop %>% mutate(sum_aic=aic_one+aic_two) %>% filter(sum_aic==min(sum_aic))
    if (df_output_min_aic$sum_aic[1] < df_current$aic[i]) {
      return(rbind(data.table::data.table(iter=iterator_padded, window=df_output_min_aic$window_one[1], length=df_output_min_aic$length_one[1],
                                          aic=df_output_min_aic$aic_one[1], dir=df_output_min_aic$dir_one[1], is_divided=TRUE),
                   data.table::data.table(iter=iterator_padded, window=df_output_min_aic$window_two[1], length=df_output_min_aic$length_two[1],
                                          aic=df_output_min_aic$aic_two[1], dir=df_output_min_aic$dir_two[1], is_divided=TRUE)))
    } else {
      return(data.table::data.table(iter=df_current$iter[i], window=df_current$window[i], length=df_current$length[i], aic=df_current$aic[i], dir=df_current$dir[i], is_divided=FALSE))
    }
  }

  # update variables
  df_current <- as.data.frame(df_output)
  df_current$basewindow <- sapply(df_current$window, function(x) { paste(unlist(strsplit(x, split="_"))[1:2], collapse="_") })
  df_current <- df_current %>%
                  group_by(basewindow) %>%
                  mutate(freq=formatC(row_number(), width=2, format="d", flag="0")) %>%
                  ungroup() %>%
                  mutate(window=paste(basewindow, freq, sep="_")) %>%
                  select(-basewindow, -freq)

  # save output file
  data.table::fwrite(df_current, file=fn_df_current, row.names=F, col.names=T, quote=F, sep="\t")
  log4r::info(fn_logger, paste("Division: Iteration", iterator_padded, "Finished!"))

  rm(df_output)
}

stopCluster(nwcl)
```

```{r combine}
# remove column from the table
df_current$is_divided <- NULL
df_current$is_combined <- rep(TRUE, nrow(df_current))

# extract basewindow
df_current$basewindow <- sapply(df_current$window, function(x) { paste(unlist(strsplit(x, split="_"))[1:2], collapse="_") })

# create doSNOW cluster
nwcl <- makeCluster(params$thread)
doSNOW::registerDoSNOW(nwcl)

# iterate over windows
df_output <- foreach (wname = unique(df_current$basewindow), .combine='rbind') %dopar% {
  df_subset <- df_current[df_current$basewindow == wname,]

  # output directory
  dir_output <- paste0(outdir_combine, wname, "/")
  if (!dir.exists(dir_output)) {
    dir.create(dir_output, recursive=T)
  }

  # set initial values
  is_repeat <- TRUE
  iterator <- 0

  # skip the iteration if all windows cannot be merged together
  while (is_repeat == TRUE) {
    # update iterator
    iterator <- iterator + 1
    iterator_padded <- paste0("m",formatC(iterator, width=2, format="d", flag="0"))

    # return data.frame if there is only one row
    fn_output_wname <- paste0(dir_output, "summary_aic_iter", iterator_padded, ".tsv")
    if (nrow(df_subset) == 1) {
      if (!file.exists(fn_output_wname) && !params$redo) {
        data.table::fwrite(df_subset, file=fn_output_wname, row.names=F, col.names=T, quote=F, sep="\t")
      }

      is_repeat <- FALSE
      break
    }

    # output data.frame
    if (file.exists(fn_output_wname) && !params$redo) {
      df_subset <- data.table::fread(fn_output_wname)
      next
    }

    # check if all windows cannot be merged
    if (all(df_subset$is_combined == FALSE)) {
      is_repeat <- FALSE
      break
    }

    # extract the first row
    df_subset_out <- df_subset[1,]

    # output directory
    dir_output_iter <- paste0(dir_output, "iter", iterator_padded, "/")
    if (!dir.exists(dir_output_iter)) {
      dir.create(dir_output_iter, recursive=T)
    }

    # iterate over windows
    for (i in 2:nrow(df_subset)) {
      # last merged entry
      j <- nrow(df_subset_out)

      # check if the two windows can be merged
      if (df_subset_out$is_combined[j] == FALSE && df_subset$is_combined[i] == FALSE) {
        df_subset_out <- rbind(df_subset_out, df_subset[i,])
        next
      }

      # FASTA file
      fn_combined_fasta <- paste0(dir_output_iter, df_subset_out$window[j], "_", df_subset$window[i], ".fa")
      if (!file.exists(fn_combined_fasta) && !params$redo) {
        # combine sequence
        system(paste(params$exe_seqkit, "concat --full", df_subset_out$dir[j], df_subset$dir[i], ">", fn_combined_fasta))
      }

      # read FASTA file
      seq_len <- df_subset_out$length[j]+df_subset$length[i]

      # output files
      fn_iqtree <- paste0(fn_combined_fasta, ".iqtree")
      fn_treefile <- paste0(fn_combined_fasta, ".treefile")
      if (!all(file.exists(fn_iqtree, fn_treefile)) && !params$redo) {
        f_iqtree2_single_keepident(fn_combined_fasta, params$outgroup, seq_len, params$set_blmin, params$set_model, params$dna_model, "", 0, params$iqtree2dir)
      }

      # extract AIC
      out <- f_window_tree_statistics(fn_iqtree, fn_treefile, NULL, NULL)
      aic <- (2 * out$freeparams) - (2 * out$logl)

      # compare AIC
      if (aic < df_subset_out$aic[j]+df_subset$aic[i]) {
        df_subset_out[j,] <- list(iter=iterator_padded, window=df_subset_out$window[j], length=seq_len, aic=aic, dir=fn_combined_fasta, is_combined=TRUE, basewindow=wname)
      } else {
        df_subset$is_combined[i] <- FALSE
        df_subset_out$is_combined[j] <- FALSE
        df_subset_out <- rbind(df_subset_out, df_subset[i,])
      }
    }

    df_subset <- df_subset_out
    data.table::fwrite(df_subset, file=fn_output_wname, row.names=F, col.names=T, quote=F, sep="\t")
  }

  return(df_subset)
}

stopCluster(nwcl)
log4r::info(fn_logger, paste("Merging: Individual Windows Finished!"))

# ----------------- MERGING INTER-WINDOWS -----------------
# output directory
dir_output <- paste0(outdir_combine, "breakpoints/")
if (!dir.exists(dir_output)) {
  dir.create(dir_output, recursive=T)
}

# set initial values
is_repeat <- TRUE
iterator <- 0

# skip the iteration if all windows cannot be merged together
while (is_repeat == TRUE) {
  # update iterator
  iterator <- iterator + 1
  iterator_padded <- paste0("b",formatC(iterator, width=2, format="d", flag="0"))

  # output data.frame
  fn_output_wname <- paste0(dir_output, "summary_aic_iter", iterator_padded, ".tsv")
  if (file.exists(fn_output_wname) && !params$redo) {
    df_output <- data.table::fread(fn_output_wname)
    next
  }

  # check if all windows cannot be merged
  if (all(df_subset$is_combined == FALSE) && iterator != 1) {
    is_repeat <- FALSE
    break
  }

  # extract the first row
  df_current <- df_output[1,]

  # output directory
  dir_output_iter <- paste0(dir_output, "iter", iterator_padded, "/")
  if (!dir.exists(dir_output_iter)) {
    dir.create(dir_output_iter, recursive=T)
  }

  # iterate over window breakpoints
  for (i in 2:nrow(df_output)) {
    # last merged entry
    j <- nrow(df_current)

    # extract window
    basewindow_one <- paste(unlist(strsplit(df_current$window[j], split="_"))[1:2], collapse="_")
    basewindow_two <- paste(unlist(strsplit(df_output$window[i], split="_"))[1:2], collapse="_")
    basewindow_one_num <- as.numeric(unlist(strsplit(df_current$window[j], split="_"))[2])
    basewindow_two_num <- as.numeric(unlist(strsplit(df_output$window[i], split="_"))[2])

    if (basewindow_two_num != basewindow_one_num || any(c(df_subset_out$is_combined[j],df_subset$is_combined[i]))) {
      fn_combined_fasta <- paste0(dir_output_iter, df_current$window[j], "_", df_output$window[i], ".fa")
      if (!file.exists(fn_combined_fasta) && !params$redo) {
        # combine sequence
        system(paste(params$exe_seqkit, "concat --full", df_current$dir[j], df_output$dir[i], ">", fn_combined_fasta))
      }

      # read FASTA file
      seq_len <- df_current$length[j]+df_output$length[i]

      # output files
      fn_iqtree <- paste0(fn_combined_fasta, ".iqtree")
      fn_treefile <- paste0(fn_combined_fasta, ".treefile")
      if (!all(file.exists(fn_iqtree, fn_treefile)) && !params$redo) {
        f_iqtree2_single_keepident(fn_combined_fasta, params$outgroup, seq_len, params$set_blmin, params$set_model, params$dna_model, "", 0, params$iqtree2dir)
      }

      # extract AIC
      out <- f_window_tree_statistics(fn_iqtree, fn_treefile, NULL, NULL)
      aic <- (2 * out$freeparams) - (2 * out$logl)

      # compare AIC
      if (aic < df_current$aic[j]+df_output$aic[i]) {
        df_current[j,] <- list(iter=iterator_padded, window=df_current$window[j], length=seq_len, aic=aic, dir=fn_combined_fasta, is_combined=TRUE, basewindow=basewindow_one)
      } else {
        df_output$is_combined[i] <- FALSE
        df_current$is_combined[j] <- FALSE
        df_current <- rbind(df_current, df_output[i,])
      }
    } else {
      df_output$is_combined[i] <- FALSE
      df_current$is_combined[j] <- FALSE
      df_current <- rbind(df_current, df_output[i,])
    }
  }

  df_output <- df_current
  data.table::fwrite(df_output, file=fn_output_wname, row.names=F, col.names=T, quote=F, sep="\t")
}

# update data.frame
df_current <- df_output %>%
                group_by(basewindow) %>%
                mutate(freq=formatC(row_number(), width=2, format="d", flag="0")) %>%
                ungroup() %>%
                mutate(window=paste(basewindow, freq, sep="_")) %>%
                select(-basewindow, -freq)

# save data.frame
data.table::fwrite(df_current, file=fn_summary, row.names=F, col.names=T, quote=F, sep="\t")
log4r::info(fn_logger, "Merging Finished!")
```

```{r visualisation}
# extract the initial length
df_current$basewindow <- sapply(df_current$window, function(x) { paste(unlist(strsplit(x, split="_"))[1:2], collapse="_") })
initial_length <- df_current %>% group_by(basewindow) %>% summarise(n=sum(length))
initial_length <- initial_length$n[1]

# extract the last window
last_window <- df_current$basewindow[nrow(df_current)]
last_window <- unlist(strsplit(last_window, split="_"))[2]

width <- length(unlist(strsplit(last_window, split="")))
n_window <- as.numeric(last_window)

# create a new dataframe for visualisation
df_visualisation <- data.frame(x=0, wname="window_NA", wsize=0)
for (i in 1:n_window) {
  iterator_padded <- formatC(i, width=width, format="d", flag="0")
  current_window <- paste0("window_", iterator_padded)

  # check if window exists
  df_subset <- df_current[df_current$basewindow == current_window,]
  if (nrow(df_subset) == 0) {
    start <- max(df_visualisation$x) + 1
    stop <- start + initial_length - 1
    df_visualisation <- rbind(df_visualisation, data.frame(x=seq(start,stop,by=1),
                                                            wname=rep(current_window,initial_length),
                                                            wsize=rep(NA,initial_length)))
  
  } else {
    # iterate over partitions
    for (j in 1:nrow(df_subset)) {
      start <- max(df_visualisation$x) + 1
      stop <- start + df_subset$length[j] - 1
      df_visualisation <- rbind(df_visualisation, data.frame(x=seq(start,stop,by=1),
                                                              wname=rep(df_subset$window[j],df_subset$length[j]),
                                                              wsize=rep(df_subset$length[j],df_subset$length[j])))
    }
  }
}

# remove the first row
df_visualisation <- df_visualisation[-1,]

# plot window size across position
plot <- ggplot(df_visualisation, aes(x=x, y=wsize, colour=wname)) +
  geom_point(shape=16) +
  ggtitle(paste("Variation of Window Size across", params$prefix)) +
  ylab("Window size (bp)") + xlab("Position (bp)") +
  theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 50),
      plot.margin = margin(1.25, 1.25, 1.25, 1.25, "cm"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40, margin = margin(t=20, r=0, b=0, l=0)),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 40, margin = margin(t=0, r=20, b=0, l=0)),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size=30),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size=30),
      strip.text = element_text(size=30),
      legend.position = "none"
    )

tiff(filename=fn_position_wsize, units="px", width=2880, height=1800)
print(plot)
dev.off()

# plot window size against the middle position
middle_position <- median(df_visualisation$x)

df_visualisation <- df_visualisation %>%
  group_by(wname,wsize) %>%
  summarise(middle_value=median(x)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(distmid=abs(middle_value-middle_position))

plot <- ggplot(df_visualisation, aes(x=distmid, y=wsize, colour=wname)) +
  geom_point(shape=16) +
  ggtitle("Variation of Window Size from the Centromere") +
  ylab("Window size (bp)") + xlab("Position from the middle (bp)") +
  theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 50),
      plot.margin = margin(1.25, 1.25, 1.25, 1.25, "cm"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40, margin = margin(t=20, r=0, b=0, l=0)),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 40, margin = margin(t=0, r=20, b=0, l=0)),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size=30),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size=30),
      strip.text = element_text(size=30),
      legend.position = "none"
    )

tiff(filename=fn_midpos_wsize, units="px", width=2880, height=1800)
print(plot)
dev.off()
```
